reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.

authoritative_basis: Gate C exit remains authoritative only on sealed head 71268f2f7489aadec338d5e71bb5b70f8a7fe9dc.
Gate D postures remain D1 bounded, D2 controlled counted-domain expansion, D3 adapter evolution authorized, D4 no external comparative claims, and D5 lab-only.
B04 launch surface remains the lawful container for ordered Gate D ratification only.
B04.R1 ratified the crucible and pressure forcing-law spine and bound later promotion eligibility to replayable, receipt-backed crucible evidence.
B04.R2 ratified adapter lifecycle states, registry rows, lineage consumption, and promotion-eligibility consumption without widening into later Gate D domains.
B04.R3 ratified the bounded selection arena: finite tournament classes, explicit promotion and demotion rules, rollback-bound merge law, and a future-gated router candidate pool.
B04.R4 ratified explainable, replayable router shadow evaluation against the audited static router baseline while keeping learned-router cutover and lobe promotion blocked.
B04.R5 ratified the same-head router-versus-best-adapter proof surface and held the static baseline honestly because router superiority was not earned on the sealed head.
The first same-head counted R5 rerun on head 360b93eca6fc8183c6f3a20087d6a73f023b6b1d passed honestly and still held the static baseline because router superiority was not earned.
The second same-head counted R5 rerun on head e232a7762ea03a3eea391c6a4da6486b892eabdd also passed honestly and still held the static baseline because router superiority was not earned.

The later lab readiness refresh on head cf1e631f2892d591ed3fb6e71c024c59a383509c confirmed both code-terminal and math-terminal paths survive broader reruns without collapsing back into code-specialist dominance.
The current lab readiness ceiling on head 43e234aa77f0d406aa56a8d85c97f8cde08b8653 is frozen as lab-only signal with counted_lane_recommendation = KEEP_COUNTED_LANE_CLOSED.

The current lab reconsideration gate packet on head bd800e9ab56e3f6a1eba19f7cbf20fe23fbcf5b0 holds because the candidate refresh reused the same lab head and introduced no new terminal adapter beyond the frozen ceiling.

The only sanctioned path for preparing any future router-readiness reconsideration input is KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/router/run_router_readiness_reconsideration_input.py, which fails closed unless the gate packet already earns material_change_earned = true.
R6 remains next in order only and blocked in law until router superiority is actually earned on a future counted same-head rerun.

state_reconciliation.latest_sealed_receipts_current_state: Gate C is exited. Gate D remains bounded and ordered. The B04 launch surface is intact, R1 ratified crucible and pressure law, R2 ratified adapter lifecycle law, R3 ratified the bounded selection arena, R4 ratified explainable router shadow evaluation, and the original R5 plus both counted same-head R5 reruns held the static baseline honestly because router superiority was not earned. The later lab readiness refresh, the current lab readiness ceiling, and the current lab reconsideration gate are preserved as noncanonical lab signal only. Learned-router cutover, lobe authority, externality, comparative claims, and commercial scope remain blocked.
state_reconciliation.documentary_surface_state_on_main: Tracked gate_c_exit_adjudication_receipt.json, gate_d_decision_law_receipt.json, gate_d_decision_receipt.json, b04_civilization_activation_launch_receipt.json, R1-R5 tracked Gate D receipts, and later tracked Gate D receipts remain non-authoritative carriers on main whenever subject_head differs from the requested head.
state_reconciliation.reanchor_decision: The second same-head counted rerun of B04.R5 completed honestly and did not earn router superiority. The later lab readiness refresh ceiling remains frozen as lab-only signal, and the current lab reconsideration gate now makes explicit that no later router-readiness reconsideration input may be prepared unless a future gate packet earns material_change_earned = true. KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/router/run_router_readiness_reconsideration_input.py is the only sanctioned path for preparing that lab-only input. R6 remains next in order only and blocked in law. No higher-scope widening is authorized, and any future counted reopening still requires a later lawful router-readiness reconsideration input plus another same-head R5 rerun.

next_counted_workstream_scope: B04.R6 is next in order only and remains blocked in law because the second same-head rerun of B04.R5 did not earn router superiority. The current lab readiness ceiling and reconsideration gate are frozen as preservation posture only and do not reopen counting. No later router-readiness reconsideration input may be prepared unless a future gate packet earns material_change_earned = true, and KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/router/run_router_readiness_reconsideration_input.py is the only sanctioned path for preparing that input. Any future counted reopening still requires that later lawful input plus another same-head R5 rerun after materially stronger lab evidence.

Do not let tracked carrier receipts stand in for current-head authority.
Do not bypass the ordered Gate D ratification sequence.
executable_now_why: No counted work is executable now.
